metadata.title: USB SD Browser
metadata.description: Browse CrossPoint Reader's SD card from the browser over USB. Supports rename, delete, and new folder (uploads, downloads, and moves are not supported).
metadata.ogDescription: Connect via WebSerial to browse the SD card on CrossPoint Reader and rename, delete, or create folders.

hero.title: USB SD Browser
hero.subtitle: Browse the SD card over USB. Only rename, delete, and new folder are supported — uploads, downloads, and moves are not.

browserUnsupported.title: WebSerial not supported
browserUnsupported.description: This feature requires a Chromium-based browser (Chrome, Edge, Opera). Firefox and Safari do not implement the WebSerial API.

instructions.title: How it works

step1.title: Plug in USB cable
step1.body: Connect the device to your PC with a USB cable. The device must be powered on.

step2.title: Grant port access
step2.body: Click Connect device in the top right. The browser opens a serial-port picker — choose USB JTAG/serial debug unit.

step3.title: Tidy the file tree
step3.body: Once connected, the SD card tree appears. You can rename items, delete them, and create new folders.

instructions.note: USB mode currently supports rename, delete, and new folder only. Uploads, downloads, and moving items between folders are not supported.

browser.dropZone: Drop files here to upload to the current folder
browser.name: Name

errors.deviceNotResponding: Device not responding. Check the connection.
